name: solospider-monorepo
description: SoloSpider AI Monorepo — Next.js app, BullMQ worker, Supabase

scripts.dev: npx -y concurrently -n "next,worker" -c "blue,magenta" "npm run dev:next" "npm run dev:worker"
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --prefix apps/worker && npm run typecheck --prefix apps/web-next
